description:
GIVEN a user launches the app
AND the user has TTS enabled

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the "Settings" button
steps.result:
THEN the app reader says “Settings, press select to access your account settings, X of Y in the menu, press left for more items in the menu”

NOTE: X should be based on how many buttons are visible to the user in the menu and the place that settings is in that order
